ab: kasauny kacuing amen na nia sinsi maqaqaquzipan, i paljing amen kilasudj a venely ta kipu.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: ka ljitaladj ta qaqaquzipan, aya ti sinsi:“ aza i sangas pakata qayaqayam, aza i likuz pakata kanaqatjuvian, kitimun a patjatjauvaik a pacun ta talidu.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: malekutj a ken tua qatjuvi, sika ini pacun na ken ta kanaqatjuvian.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: na pacung a ken ta liaw a qayaqayam, tiamadju i tua kasiw pavavaw a minlayalayap, izuanan pinacunan a ljequ na taqed itua na kasiw a belung.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: aza qaqaquzipan izua zung, unma kata tjakakudralan a ngiangiyaw, kasicuayan inianan pacung ta namitucu a dubuc, kasauny ku pacunan maleva racac.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: liaw a u sinasin, uli sipapacung ta u kama kati kina.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，要給我爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: nu tjaivililj uli kiciul a ken tja kama kina maciul a semamaza.
ch: 下次我要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
